narrative:
Reyns 2-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 457 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
